tool_args.label: MTA Diversity, Equity & Inclusion Strategic Plan 2025-2030

payload.project_name: MTA Diversity, Equity & Inclusion Strategic Plan 2025 – 2030
payload.description: MTA in Motion: Leading With Bold Vision and Momentum

Create dedicated stroller space on fifty-seven (57) local and select routes operating out of six depots that served a combined 250,000 daily weekly riders in 2021. Retrofitting all local and select buses operating out of six depots with designated stroller spaces.
payload.program: New York City Transit Customer Strategy 5

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.

payload.description: Transition entire bus fleet and non-revenue vehicle fleet to zero-emission vehicles by 2040. All new bus deliveries must be zero-emissions by 2029. Transition to zero-emission bus service by 2039.
